name: swiftui-mv
description: SwiftUI MV architecture guidance for views, services, DataStore, DesignSystem, Resources, and Utils.

interface.longDescription: Build, refactor, and review SwiftUI apps using MV + Services + DataStore + DesignSystem architecture without introducing ViewModels by default.
defaultPrompt: Use SwiftUI MV to review this app architecture.
Refactor this SwiftUI feature into MV + Services.
